tasks.label: Launch Pixel 9 Pro Emulator
tasks.command:
export ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk && export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools && ALREADY=$(for s in $(adb devices | grep 'emulator.*device$' | awk '{print $1}'); do avd=$(adb -s $s emu avd name 2>/dev/null | head -1 | tr -d '
 '); [ "$avd" = "Pixel_9_Pro" ] && echo $s; done) && [ -z "$ALREADY" ] && $ANDROID_HOME/emulator/emulator -avd Pixel_9_Pro -dns-server 8.8.8.8,8.8.4.4 -no-snapshot-load &; SERIAL='' && until [ -n "$SERIAL" ]; do for s in $(adb devices | grep 'emulator.*device$' | awk '{print $1}'); do avd=$(adb -s $s emu avd name 2>/dev/null | head -1 | tr -d '
 '); boot=$(adb -s $s shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '
'); if [ "$avd" = "Pixel_9_Pro" ] && [ "$boot" = "1" ]; then SERIAL=$s; fi; done; [ -z "$SERIAL" ] && sleep 3; done && echo "Pixel 9 Pro ready: $SERIAL"

tasks.label: Launch Pixel Tablet Emulator
tasks.command:
export ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk && export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools && ALREADY=$(for s in $(adb devices | grep 'emulator.*device$' | awk '{print $1}'); do avd=$(adb -s $s emu avd name 2>/dev/null | head -1 | tr -d '
 '); [ "$avd" = "Pixel_Tablet" ] && echo $s; done) && [ -z "$ALREADY" ] && $ANDROID_HOME/emulator/emulator -avd Pixel_Tablet -dns-server 8.8.8.8,8.8.4.4 -no-snapshot-load &; SERIAL='' && until [ -n "$SERIAL" ]; do for s in $(adb devices | grep 'emulator.*device$' | awk '{print $1}'); do avd=$(adb -s $s emu avd name 2>/dev/null | head -1 | tr -d '
 '); boot=$(adb -s $s shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '
'); if [ "$avd" = "Pixel_Tablet" ] && [ "$boot" = "1" ]; then SERIAL=$s; fi; done; [ -z "$SERIAL" ] && sleep 3; done && adb -s $SERIAL shell "ndc resolver setnetdns 100 '' 8.8.8.8 8.8.4.4" 2>/dev/null; echo "Pixel Tablet ready: $SERIAL"

export ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk && export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools && ALREADY=$(for s in $(adb devices | grep 'emulator.*device$' | awk '{print $1}'); do avd=$(adb -s $s emu avd name 2>/dev/null | head -1 | tr -d '
 '); [ "$avd" = "Mini_Tablet_7" ] && echo $s; done) && [ -z "$ALREADY" ] && $ANDROID_HOME/emulator/emulator -avd Mini_Tablet_7 -dns-server 8.8.8.8,8.8.4.4 -no-snapshot-load &; SERIAL='' && until [ -n "$SERIAL" ]; do for s in $(adb devices | grep 'emulator.*device$' | awk '{print $1}'); do avd=$(adb -s $s emu avd name 2>/dev/null | head -1 | tr -d '
 '); boot=$(adb -s $s shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '
'); if [ "$avd" = "Mini_Tablet_7" ] && [ "$boot" = "1" ]; then SERIAL=$s; fi; done; [ -z "$SERIAL" ] && sleep 3; done && echo "Mini Tablet 7 ready: $SERIAL"
